programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder?
programme.desc: Police believed that a husband murdered his wife after they learn that he had taken out a life insurance policy on her shortly before she died. When an investigator recreates the fall, the results are surprising.

programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, her parents told police that she was killed by a dog.

programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: No Safety in Numbers
programme.desc: Two pairs of survivalists are surprised when they must take on the deadly jungles of Panama side-by-side. But before their 21-day challenge begins, they have to re-think their survival strategies along gender lines.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: For Better or A Lot Worse
programme.desc: The first couple to take on a twenty-one day challenge tests themselves and their relationship as they take on the Guyana jungle. They battle jaguars, anacondas, caiman, and more than two-million species of insects.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Feel the Burn
programme.desc: Dressed up with insider facts and extra scenes: Two fans are put to the test in the scorching hot Guyanese savanna where battle fourteen days of relentless bug bites, torrential downpours and minimal food?

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Rainforests and Deserts
programme.desc: Three pairs of survivalists take on the harsh humidity in the rainforests of Honduras, sleep deprivation and serious injuries in the African Savanna and a potentially fatal flood in the wilds of Texas.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Anaconda River Rapids
programme.desc: Naked survivalists are challenged to survive in harsh and dangerous environments.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Stone Cold
programme.desc: An Army vet and newly married man grapple with gender norms in the mountains of Croatia. Extreme hunger and freezing temperatures force the two to bond while a storm threatens to tear them apart.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: First Gold
programme.desc: 'The Dakota Boys' launch their gold dredge. Fred dives in the raging white water, and despite running out of air, the 72-year-old veteran succeeds in finding their first gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Dredge Down
programme.desc: The first gold nugget promises a monster payday. But when Dustin dives into the danger zone, a torrent where the current moves rocks, a rogue boulder almost costs him his life.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Boulder Battles
programme.desc: Fred's ex-boss Todd Hoffman has invested $50,000 in the Dakota Boy's operation. He infuriates Dustin, when he pays a surprise visit in a chopper.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Inland Tsunami
programme.desc: Fred gets married for the fourth time. A landslide upstream threatens to unleash a wall of water that could destroy the dive site and drown the miners.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Hypothermia
programme.desc: The Dakota Boys' desperate bid to hit bedrock gold is thwarted when 73-year-old Fred's heating system fails mid-dive and he's overcome by the glacial Alaskan water.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: The Graboid
programme.desc: The Dakota Boys are digging down to bedrock gold but when they hit the biggest boulder of the season Dustin is forced to rig a new mechanical solution: the Graboid.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: End of Days
programme.desc: A flash flood racing down McKinley Creek threatens to kill the crew and destroy their operation, but the Dakota Boys still manage to find more gold than they've gotten all season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: No Guts No Glory
programme.desc: Six recession-hit patriots from Oregon become greenhorn old miners and head to Alaska to dig for gold in hopes of striking it big to save themselves from financial ruin.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Gold, Guns, and Bears
programme.desc: The greenhorn miners are at risk when a mechanical accident threatens to close mining season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Running Dirt
programme.desc: The crew races to set up the mining plant and start running dirt. When the families arrive from Oregon and question the lack of gold and the men's only mechanic becomes dangerously ill, the tension builds so high Dorsey and Todd come to blows.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Ultimate Price
programme.desc: The team attempts to finally run potential pay dirt through the wash plant, but a visit from the Department of Fish and Game reveals a violation, jeopardizing their vital water supply to the mine.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Pain Barrier
programme.desc: The miners continue to run dirt but an equipment malfunction brings the operation to a halt. James Harness collapses and Jimmy Dorsey drives a wedge between himself and the crew when he takes on an extra job to earn cash.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Gold Fever
programme.desc: After 80 days, the miners are behind schedule and out of money. They need to find $10,000 worth of gold within two days or the families will be sent home. Meanwhile, after Dorsey struggles with the wave table, tensions flare and fists fly.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not Hell Nor High Water
programme.desc: Randy is in Louisiana to save bride Kelli's big day after she lost everything in a devastating flood. Social media star Claudia Oshrey, aka Girl With No Job, brings sass to her appointment. Pnina Tornai feels the heat during Bridal Fashion Week.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: Out of the Blue
programme.desc: Avery's mom deals with some bad news. Benjamin sees a new side of Akinyi. Rebecca is alarmed by a request from Zied. Darcey becomes emotional during a night out in Albania. Angela and Michael look into fertility options in Nigeria. Caesar departs Mexico.

programme.title: Conjoined Twins: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: When they were born to their Dominican mother, conjoined twins Maria and Theresa Tapia were declared doomed in the delivery room, and now, one twin's life hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Inseparable: Joined at the Head
programme.desc: Tatiana and Krista are the only known conjoined twins who doctors suspect can see and feel what the other sees and feels. This special hour follows the twins through a year in their lives and a landmark tenth birthday.

programme.title: My Baby's Head Keeps Growing
programme.desc: Meet three children that have hydrocephalus (water on the brain) that left them with unusually large heads.

programme.title: Bubble Skin Man
programme.desc: Chandra is afflicted by a terrible and unknown condition that has left his body riddled with hundreds of tumours. Now with signs of the condition appearing in his two oldest children, Chandra is racing against time to find a cure.

programme.desc: A crowbar is impaled in a man's skull. A bride refuses to take off her wedding dress to be examined.

programme.desc: Lisa has a horn growing out of the back of her head and fears that it could be cancer. Victor has a bulbous lump on the middle of his chest. Chuck has a Popeye-shaped bump on his arm. Christian and Jonathan are teenage brothers with matching lumps.

programme.desc: Wannabe Gypsy bride Sabrina must prove herself to the Gypsy community by undergoing a humiliating ancient trial. Traditions and rituals are an integral part of Gypsy life today, and when Gypsies break the code, there's usually hell to pay.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Gypsy Jinxes and Wedding Hijinks
programme.desc: Sisters Brittany and Kalynn plan to wed their gorger fiancés in a Gypsy-style double wedding, but their big day may be put on hold when a jealous sister-in-law threatens to start a war. Later, a superstitious couple is convinced their wedding is cursed.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: There's a New Guy in Town

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Just Say No
programme.desc: Find out which joker loves blackjack, what baseball team two of the guys split season tickets for and how they found the lovely lady whose heart Q broke during his ball field punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Sister Smackdown
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, Jackson helps a cat named Charlee rebuild the confidence that her sister cat, Frankie, has nearly beaten out of her. The Cat Daddy must crack the case of a pee soaked apartment in order help a family with multiple cats.

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet: Raging Bull
programme.desc: Dr. Dee flies to Healy, Alaska for a remote clinic. While performing a spay, she notices a dog has tumors. Outside Fairbanks, Dr. Dee also gets Nugget the Bull ready for breeding season, while Dr. Terry gets a big surprise giving shots to six kittens.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Tiger's Tale
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff gives hope to a concerned owner when their dog is diagnosed with cancer. The team cares for a litter of abandoned kittens. Dr. Amy solves the mystery of a beloved cat's painful injury. And Dr. Jeff and Hector help a rescued tiger find love.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Gorilla with Heart
programme.desc: Surgery on a silverback gorilla's broken canine reveals a more serious medical issue. Love may be in the air for two birds of paradise, Glory and Holiday. And, dozens of venomous tarantulas keep the staff on their toes.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Tiger Family Matters
programme.desc: Sumatran tiger mom Kirana is facing the loss of her sons, Topan and Jaya. They're now adults, and being moved to other zoos to start families of their own. But keepers are unsure how Kirana and her remaining cub will react to the departure of the boys.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Pushing Forward
programme.desc: Tia attempts to rescue a stray, but her leg injury holds her back. New parolee Mike struggles to balance working and being a parent. And, a family comes to Villalobos hoping to adopt a dog for their daughter, but finding a good match proves a challenge.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Going the Distance
programme.desc: After his adopter passes away, Tania heads to California to pick up a former VRC dog. A couple from Arkansas struggle to make a decision about which dog to adopt. And, after being rescued, a badly injured puppy is discovered to be a missing pet.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Baby Rhino Due Date
programme.desc: Eastern black rhino Kitani is due to give birth, and help swell the ranks of this endangered species. However, with Kitani having lost three previous calves, it's a worrying time. Keepers are concerned that things aren't going to plan.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Chimp Negotiations
programme.desc: On chimp island, the group are wielding a large stick. Keeper Niall attempts to negotiate with eldest chimp Boris for its return, but Boris is wary of dominant male Dylan stealing his reward, and plays hardball with Niall.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Toxic Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a small house that's aggressively priced and could be a lucrative deal based on comparable sales in the neighbourhood. They go to inspect the house before making a decision and find it boarded up and in rough shape.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Communal Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip the worst home on the block in an Anaheim Hills neighbourhood. With high profit margins in a desirable neighbourhood this should be a slam dunk, but can Tarek and Christina renovate quickly enough?

programme.title: Flip or Flop: A Frantic Fiasco
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina head to Placentia, California, to check out a lead on a mid-century property. The home is dated but the size and layout is a designer's dream, and most importantly, the numbers indicate it could be a profitable deal.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Pigeonhole Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a home that's full of surprises in Santa Ana, California. They work to modernize the house as much as possible to appeal to the modern-day buyer, but with every challenge comes many problems.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Midcentury Maze
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina check out a three-bedroom, two-bathroom home in their new stomping grounds of Garden Grove, California. Hoping to snatch this property before it hits the market, they arrive to find the house is dirty with a mosquito-infested pool.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Of Wreck and Ruin

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Additional Problems

programme.title: America's National Parks: Great Smoky Mountains

programme.title: Wild Mississippi: Raging Waters
programme.desc: Spring is in bloom, and all the snow and ice from across the watershed is melting, triggering a massive flood of biblical proportions. We'll see how the inhabitants adjust and fight to survive.

programme.title: Wild Mississippi: Delta Blues
programme.desc: Our romance with the Mississippi River heats up as we head south. The river joins with an even more flooded Ohio River to form a union of destruction that challenges man and wildlife.

programme.title: World's Weirdest: Freaks in the Ocean
programme.desc: Sea slug orgies; hermaphrodite flatworms; fish that walk on land and lizards that walk on water dive in with the Worlds Weirdest underwater creatures.

programme.title: World's Weirdest: Freaks on Land
programme.desc: Komodo dragons use a sixth sense -- a smell-o-vision from the roofs of their mouths -- to seek out prey. Cannibal black widow spiders sense movement with their feet.

programme.title: World's Weirdest: Freaks of the Sky
programme.desc: The sky isn't just for the birds. Some of the world's strangest animals don't need wings for takeoff. Flying squirrels are more like paper airplanes, with built-in evolutionary parachutes.

programme.title: World's Weirdest: Almost Human
programme.desc: Lemurs getting high and drunken bees getting trouble at work are featured.

programme.title: World's Weirdest: Freaky All-Stars
programme.desc: Meet some of the world's most bizarre creatures. Meet the offspring of a male lion and female tiger and a tiny bug that can leap 6 inches in the air.

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea Death Star
programme.desc: When satellites spot a mysterious structure in North Korea, experts investigate if this sinister evidence points to a looming nuclear threat, and using cutting-edge tech, they reveal dark secrets from this strange place.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Aliens of the Infinity War
programme.desc: Experts wonder if a strange pattern that appears in a field is an extraterrestrial response to a message sent to an alien star cluster in 1974, and using cutting-edge science, they uncover its true origin.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley
programme.desc: Searching for a Gold Rush ghost town's legendary hidden treasure in the hills surrounding the town.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Amazon Ghost Town
programme.desc: An American ghost town in the Amazon jungle, a secret Nazi base, and a deadly concrete fortress 866 miles long are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes
programme.desc: When a secret bunker and a vast network of tunnels are discovered after World War II, experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover if the high levels of radiation in the area could be connected to a classified Nazi nuclear program.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win World War II at all costs, and using the latest science and tech, experts investigate what really happened here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Amazon Ghost Town
programme.desc: An American ghost town in the Amazon jungle, a secret Nazi base, and a deadly concrete fortress 866 miles long are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hidden City of the Incas
programme.desc: The lost city of Machu Picchu is one of the greatest mysteries in archaeology. Scientists do not know why this city in the clouds was built, but investigations into secret Inca codes and deformed skeletons might finally reveal its ultimate mystery.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Pyramid of the Americas
programme.desc: At an ancient city lost in the desert for 5,000 years, experts uncover evidence of human sacrifice and strange rituals, and new discoveries reveal that the people who lived here might have been the first civilization of the Americas.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for the Real Atlantis
programme.desc: A mysterious ruined city in Greece is the home of the mythical Labyrinth and the Minotaur, and its catastrophic downfall might have inspired the legend of Atlantis. New discoveries at this site reveal a truth stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Great Wall
programme.desc: The Great Wall of China is the biggest man-made structure on the planet and one of its biggest mysteries. Follow the scientific mission to reveal the ancient secrets of one of history's greatest empires.

programme.title: Unearthed: Forbidden City of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: A mysterious city in ancient Egypt is the home of the Valley of the Kings and grand temples, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and if the god the pharaohs worshiped here helped them rise to power.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Curse of the Catacombs
programme.desc: An underground labyrinth containing thousands of human skeletons is a dark mystery beneath the streets of Rome, and now, experts are using cutting-edge tech to reveal what killed them and why they were buried in this eerie place.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Greatest Treasures
programme.desc: The world's leading experts on ancient Egypt reveal the greatest treasures and discoveries of the great empire of the Nile.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Forbidden City of the Deep
programme.desc: Experts investigate the world's oldest sunken city and reveal the secrets lost to the ocean almost four thousand years ago.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Curse of the Templars
programme.desc: Discoveries shed new light on the dark truth of the Templars, revealing their strange rituals, how they acquired their wealth, and why they suddenly disappeared.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Atlantis: The New Mystery
programme.desc: New evidence reveals that Atlantis is not just a myth, but a real civilization devastated by an apocalyptic volcanic eruption, and now, experts use the latest science to unearth discoveries that might confirm the location of this mysterious lost city.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Pompeii: The Deadly Mystery
programme.desc: Experts use the latest science and technology to reveal what Pompeii was like on the eve of its destruction, racing to uncover its last mysteries before Vesuvius erupts again.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Atlantis: The New Treasures
programme.desc: After experts discover an ancient lost city off the coast of Egypt, the race to unearth its priceless relics and bring this mysterious sunken world back to life begins, revealing the doomsday event that caused it to sink into the sea.

programme.title: Shattered: Sins of the Father
programme.desc: 1993. Rockville, MD. A woman is shocked to discover her sister and nephew killed in cold blood... unwittingly, a daughter becomes a pawn in a dark and brutal murder plot... and a prosecutor makes it his personal mission to bring a killer to justice.

programme.title: Shattered: Mother's Little Helpers
programme.desc: 2001. A son's visit home turns into a desperate search for his missing father. A detective uncovers a murder with a stunning revelation about a group of children, and a mother struggles to believe her son could be involved in a vicious crime.

programme.title: Shattered: Seven and a Half Minutes
programme.desc: Mid 1980's. A District Attorney in Wichita Falls, Texas has multiple gruesome homicides to solve. A father's grief provokes him to meet his daughter's killer face to face, and over 100 miles away, a husband is accused of the murder of his wife.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Last Ride Home
programme.desc: A wealthy labour lawyer shoots his high profile wife from the back seat of a car, and questions are raised about whether it was an accident or plain murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours Mystery: Searching for Secrets
programme.desc: A beautiful college freshman is missing. A nationwide search ensues before her friend helps unravel a secret that cracks the case. Erin Moriarty is the correspondent.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Malicious Hearts
programme.desc: Some women have ice running through their veins. They lack the instinct to care. A mom locks up and tortures her daughter like she's a prisoner-of-war; a helpful neighbor quietly kills her community; and lesbian lovers bash and burn a complete stranger.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Sleeping With the Enemy
programme.desc: When these women exposed their true selves, their men found out they'd been 'Sleeping With The Enemy.' A beauty queen tried to free herself from family duties; an accountant's tryst turned deadly; and a valedictorian made sure her man coudn't leave.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Red Hot Temper
programme.desc: Some women have short fuses, and when their blood boils get out of their way. A couple's New Year's resolution ends in a murderous rampage; a pious parish housekeeper hides a sinful secret and a Christmas drink between neighbors has a deadly hangover.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Anger Mismanagement
programme.desc: The match is struck, the fuse is lit, and it's only a matter of time before the 'Anger Mismanagement' of these Deadly Women will see them explode.

programme.title: Deadly Devotion: Highway to Hell
programme.desc: When a mysterious biker invites single mother Cynthia Garcia to an exclusive party at the Hells Angels clubhouse, she unwittingly enters a secret and dangerous world… with a sacred code that the outlaw bikers would kill to uphold.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: Brace for Impact: The Chesley B. Sullenberger Story
programme.desc: Captain Chesley Sullenberger reunites with the actual plane, re-traces his flight, and gives his chilling account during a flight back to the Hudson River where 155 people exited a sinking plane and entered history.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.title: Brace for Impact: The Chesley B. Sullenberger Story
programme.desc: Captain Chesley Sullenberger reunites with the actual plane, re-traces his flight, and gives his chilling account during a flight back to the Hudson River where 155 people exited a sinking plane and entered history.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: Legends of the West: Wild Bill: Marskman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own, by shooting him dead.

programme.title: Legends of the West: Jesse James: The South's Last Rebel
programme.desc: From the ashes of the Confederacy rises a bold rebel outlaw determined to get rich and get even. Jesse James is seen by many as a modern day Robin Hood, a Southern gentleman avenging the efforts of Northern businessmen to exploit his territory.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Yakuza
programme.desc: We go on the hunt to unearth the secrets of a widespread criminal gang in the heart of Japan who are engaged in a variety of criminal activity including extortion, prostitution and illegal gambling. It is a hard-hitting, slick-dressing network of gangs.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Priory of Sion
programme.desc: Inside Secret Societies investigates the mysterious secret society known as 'The Priory of Sion' that traces its roots back to the 12th Century and is believed to protect incontrovertible, if heretical, information about the marriage of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Warriors on the Frontlines
programme.desc: During the Vietnam War, Drew Dix and a small handful of soldiers liberate an entire city from an enemy battalion. Russian soldier Viktor Leonov vanquishes German forces in the Arctic battlegrounds of World War 2.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Soaring to New Heights
programme.desc: Test pilot Joe Kittinger volunteers to be the first man to parachute jump from the edge of space, and Air Force researcher Dr. John Stapp straps himself into rocket sleds to test the limits of human endurance.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: For a Greater Cause
programme.desc: George Rowe is a former criminal who goes undercover to bust a motorcycle gang, and the Masin brothers lead a resistance cell against Communist oppression in Czechoslovakia.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Paul Touvier
programme.desc: French investigators hunt down Paul Touvier, a pro-Nazi sympathizer who was responsible for murdering both Jews and resistance fighters. This 'Hangman of Lyon' hid himself with the assistance of a right wing group associated with the Catholic Church.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Kurt Lishka
programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Klaus Barbie
programme.desc: The husband and wife team of Serge and Beate Klarsfeld worked tirelessly to have Nazi war criminal Klaus Barbie extradited from Bolvia to stand trail in France. Barbie, known as 'The Butch of Lyon', was responsible for the deaths of 10,000 French Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Joseph Mengele
programme.desc: Examine how Mossad agents from Israel spent nearly thirty years tracking the notorious Nazi physician Josef Mengele.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Erich Priebke
programme.desc: A half-century after the war, American journalists track down former Gestapo officer Erich Priebke. Priebke, who was responsible for some of Italy's worst atrocities, fled to Argentina after the war.

programme.desc: Get some fresh holiday decorating ideas.

programme.title: Gourmet Holiday
programme.desc: A showcase of gourmet food for holiday entertaining or for gift giving.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Side-by-side Penthouse Decks
programme.desc: The crew is faced with the most difficult task to date, delivering side-by-side penthouse decks to neighboring couples in a historic Denver, Colorado, high-rise. The finished product includes indoor/ outdoor rooms, grills, and hot tubs.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Building Bigger In Texas
programme.desc: Garth travels to the Lone Star State to build its first mega deck. Garth unifies a disjointed patio, doubling the floor space and quadrupling the covered living area. The $325,000 deck is finished with fire pits, a swim spa and a mesquite bar top.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Mountain Masterpiece
programme.desc: A mountain home in Conifer, Colorado, gets a $375K deck with a wall-sized stone fireplace, a hot tub that seats 12 and a grill kitchen. Jason's team is pitted against Mother Nature, however, when an icy road leads to a delivery truck crash.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Snake River Showpiece
programme.desc: Garth and his team brave sub-freezing temperatures in Idaho to build a $590k multi-level deck with four distinct living areas. The indoor-outdoor space features a pizza oven, a mezzanine-level bar overlooking the Snake River and an infrared sauna.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Log Home Gets a Two-Story Cliffside Deck
programme.desc: Mark loves his cliffside log home in the Rocky Mountains, but the small existing deck doesn't take advantage of the million-dollar view.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Treehouse Deck for a Dream Retirement
programme.desc: After years of constant relocation, retired military officers Joe and Maddie have decided to turn their Colorado home into a dream retirement.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Powder Room Predicament
programme.desc: Nicole's next project is restoring a historic mansion in the Summit district of St. Paul. Unfortunately, some key rooms have been completely ripped apart, and her first task is to rebuild the gutted powder room from scratch.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Distressed Dining Room
programme.desc: Nicole turns her attention to taking the pink and gold kitsch out of the formal dining room. Restoring the floors, swapping out sconces and repairing the stained glass windows take the room out of the 1970s and back to 1904.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Heights Cottage
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis turns her attention to a rundown cottage in Lake Orion, Michigan. Starting in the living room, she rips out an old staircase leading to the kitchen before making her way outside to create a new boardwalk entry, picket fence and back deck.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Dollar House
programme.desc: In Minneapolis, Minnesota, Nicole Curtis buys a condemned, boarded-up house for just one dollar. She has the support of the neighbors behind her as she plans to transform it into a beautifully restored showpiece for the entire neighborhood.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Family Affair
programme.desc: It's a family affair as Nicole tackles an old shack that desperately needs some loving restoration. With the help of her brother, her nephew and her son, Ethan, carpets come up, there's new paint and a new fence.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Returning to Campbell
programme.desc: Nicole returns to her first big Detroit flip, the Campbell house, where a pipe burst and ruined the upstairs and downstairs kitchens. She decides to restore both spaces a second time using any pieces she can salvage.

programme.desc: Nicole Curtis turns her attention to a rundown cottage in Lake Orion, Michigan. Starting in the living room, she rips out an old staircase leading to the kitchen before making her way outside to create a new boardwalk entry, picket fence and back deck.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Boomtown Builder: 1914 Dentist's House
programme.desc: Tim McClellan is recruited to revamp a couple's 100-year-old guest quarters in Jerome, AZ. Originally built for the town dentist, Tim cracks open the history books and rolls up his sleeves to transform the shabby suite into a historic treasure.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Backyard Goldmine: Renovating a Richmond Shed
programme.desc: A couple in the storybook village of Richmond, Vermont, want to get Ben and Lee's thoughts on their run-down storage shed before they tear it down. Ben sees a chance to turn it into a rustic rental with a loft and kitchen.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Book Lamps and Bubble Glass
programme.desc: Renovations on the 1890s Craftsman-style home continues as Tamara enlarges the master bedroom and creates a beautiful study. She runs into trouble when the antique tiles for the bathroom floor are not salvageable. Tamara finds a way to re-use old glass.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Double Dutch Dilemma
programme.desc: Tamara gets the opportunity to renovate a French chateau she's wanted to tackle for years. She finds that a recent renovation left the kitchen looking outdated and tacky, but she's determined to create a home full of authentic details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Trouble With Cobbles
programme.desc: Tamara continues work on a French chateau as she overhauls a large master suite covered in the tackiest wallpaper she's ever ripped out. She plans to move a bathroom to create an additional bedroom and extend a hallway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All Bricked Out
programme.desc: Tamara takes an 1892 brick Craftsman that was converted into three apartments and tries to restore it back into a single-family dwelling while keeping original details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Swing of Things
programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Mural of the Story
programme.desc: Tamara works on restoring a 1909 Craftsman home, ripping out the tacky additions that have stripped it of its original charm. She saves a wallpaper mural that could be the showpiece of the dining room, if she can keep it from being destroyed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Clowning Around
programme.desc: Tamara continues with the 1909 Craftsman, transforming a small bedroom into the master bath. She saves and refurbishes French doors, vintage sinks, and a tub from the house, while adding modern elements like a sauna.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fireplaces and Wired Spaces
programme.desc: Tamara annexes an oversized dining room to enlarge a tiny kitchen in a 1926 English Tudor. She rips out an outdated and tacky mantel to create a stunning fireplace surround, and then creates a large desktop for an in-home office.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Two-deck Tudor
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to create a more spacious master suite until she decides to add a second deck to a 1926 English Tudor. In the backyard, she adds an outdoor living area with a fire pit. She and her dad then realize the garage doors may cause a problem.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Move That Kitchen
programme.desc: Tamara renovates a single-story ranch and tackles her biggest challenge to date, transforming the former master bedroom into a stunning, open kitchen. However, she and her dad run into problems during demolition.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Copper Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara continues renovations on the ranch by creating a new master suite. While polishing the copper fireplace hood, Tamara and her dad use a familiar solution that has unusual results. Her plans to create a sunroom run into problems due to weather.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Raise the Roof
programme.desc: Tamara gets creative renovating an expansive 1950 ranch-style home. She updates the exterior with faux stone and adds another floor to the 3,000-square-foot home, but rain and an old fireplace force her to rethink her plans and budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Stairway to Master Suite Heaven
programme.desc: Tamara Day uses her 1,400-square-foot second-story addition to create three new bedrooms in a 1950 ranch home.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Corbels and Chaos
programme.desc: Tamara sees great potential in a 1938 cottage with an unusual layout, unfinished renovation and no front door. She constructs a cathedral ceiling and creates two cedar corbels for the entrance. The cost of an egress window may crack her budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Skylight Surprise
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to install a full bath and enlarge the master suite as she continues to renovate the 1938 cottage. She successfully creates a hidden playroom in the kids' bedroom, but fails to win her dad's approval on her plan for the backyard shed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Rhapsody in Beige
programme.desc: Tamara transforms a contemporary home on a large wooded lot that's devoid of any character. She installs huge windows to bring the outdoors inside, but she faces issues with resurfacing a fireplace veneer.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Pain in the Deck
programme.desc: Continuing renovations on a large and bland contemporary home, Tamara tackles the master suite and replaces lots of dated cabinetry to make a stylish bathroom. She also creates a home heather and immense deck and patio.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All About the Island
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a large 1905 colonial with seven sun porches. She overhauls an ugly kitchen and a dining room with tacky orange carpet, but unsupported floors and a strange noise during demo slow her plans and may cost her big money.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Closet Fit for a Queen
programme.desc: Tamara creates a 900-square-foot master suite and converts one of the home's seven sun porches into a closet. However, her budget takes a hit when she needs to install a new HVAC unit and her plan to save a vintage fireplace might be out of gas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grillers in the Mist
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to New York for the Long Island Fun Fest and some Empire State eats. He can't resist a pizza covered in gooey penne alla vodka or a fancy Hamptons Dog, and he also tries the ultimate Italian-American combo, a Cannoli Calzone.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Steak Out
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is in carnivore mode for the San Angelo Stock Show and Rodeo in Texas.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Between the Bun
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson reveals entirely excessive and utterly outrageous takes on the humble hamburger. Beef patties and two buns are required, but every other ingredient is maxed out to create the most exorbitant burgers ever imagined.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Serious Sandwiches
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson shows off the most scrumptious and seriously stunning sandwiches ever created. These shockers prove that there are truly no limits to what can be placed between two slices of bread.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Worth the Wait
programme.desc: Alton Brown talks up his favorite beef Wellington, while Jamika Pessoa melts over buttery biscuits.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Life Changers
programme.desc: We're revealing all the unforgettable dishes that changed our lives.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ozark Mountains
programme.desc: Casey travels over the Ozarks to tackle the Goliath, a massive cupcake equal to 22 regular-sized cupcakes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Tucson
programme.desc: Adam goes to Tucson for a hot dog wrapped in bacon and covered in all the fixins.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Seattle, Washington
programme.desc: Casey travels to Seattle where he climbs a Mount Fuji-sized burger and takes on seven terrifyingly spicy Buffalo wings that have defeated over 5,000 challengers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Chicago, IL
programme.desc: Casey travels to Chicago for some epic Windy City eats, including a massive triple-threat pork sandwich and a challenge featuring a two-pound double bacon cheeseburger and two pounds of 'Irish Nacho' cheese fries.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Genuine Legends
programme.desc: We're celebrating eats and eateries that have withstood the test of time. From America's best pancakes to the ultimate doughnuts, find out which dishes make the cut and go down in history as true legends.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Yummy in the Middle
programme.desc: It's that ooey-gooey goodness in the middle that we just can't get enough of, so we're heading straight to the middle of things to see what greatness awaits. Jeff Mauro indulges in a 100-layer vanilla creme doughnut that's full of surprises.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Nola
programme.desc: New Orleans charms viewers with its distinct culinary style.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chicago
programme.desc: Chicago may be famous for its architecture, but we're here for the food. We've got a deep love for Gino's deep dish pizza, and the pork rinds at Publican are some of the best ever. The classic Chicago dog at Weiner Circle can't be topped.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Chocolate

programme.desc: Ben rocks a caricature cake covered in 19 pounds of sugar paste while Karisha surprises a bride with a working water fountain.

programme.desc: Husband and wife team Phil and Christine Jensen hope to scale new heights with a very fishy commission: a five-foot long lemon and elderflower cake designed to look like a leaping fish decorated with over 17 pounds of sugar paste.

programme.desc: Luxurious details and elegant decor make for a most-extravagant wedding cake. Then zoo animals come to life, sugar looks like hand-blown glass, and a duck rides a mechanical bull on a super playful birthday cake.

programme.desc: It's going to get a little weird in the Cupcake Wars kitchen when four competitors try to bake their way to an exclusive book release party for iconic comedian, and guest judge, "Weird Al" Yankovic.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Cupcakes on Parade

programme.desc: The Sensational Six enlist viewers' help in getting to the Trick-or-Treat Tower for the big Halloween party. They use a garbage can lid as Goofy the Knight's shield and a jack-o-lantern to light the way through the Foggy Forest.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Haunted Hot Rod/ Pete's Ghostly Gala
programme.desc: Mickey wants to race the Haunted Hot Rod, a ghostly Roadster who only races on Halloween. The Happy Helpers try to catch three ghosts who threaten to ruin Pete's Halloween Party.

programme.desc: It's the pups' birthday! Bob learns to dance.

programme.desc: The PJ Masks have to protect the trick-or-treaters and their goodie bags on Halloween!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: How ARF Got His Bark Back / Sir Bob

programme.desc: SpongeBob's spatula breaks mid-patty flip; Mr. Krabs installs a wishing well near the Krusty Krab and sends SpongeBob down the well in a bucket to collect the coins.

programme.desc: SpongeBob makes the perfect Krabby Patty; Squidward begins to get on everyone's nerves.

programme.desc: Longing for the chance to test herself and her skills apart from the influences of her royal title, a princess has been living and working incognito at a ski resort as assistant event planner.

programme.title: Movie: A Brush With Love
programme.desc: As she considers giving up on her artistic dreams, Jamie paints a vision board that brings her success and love - only to discover that the mystery man in her painting isn't who she thinks.

programme.title: Movie: Flip That Romance
programme.desc: Rival house-flippers find themselves in a renovation face-off when they are both assigned two halves of a duplex to renovate. They attempt to out-renovate each other, every-step of the way, which leads to an unexpected romance.

programme.title: Movie: Surprised by Love
programme.desc: A young businesswoman tries to convince parents to approve of her boyfriend. She finds herself questioning her own life choices.

programme.title: Movie: A Harvest Wedding
programme.desc: A wedding planner in New York is hired to plan the most anticipated wedding of the season. But the bride wants the wedding to be on the family farm which is now being run by her older brother who happens to be her ex.

programme.title: Movie: Love, of Course
programme.desc: A widowed mother moves her daughter to an out-of-state college dorm and is forced to take the next step in her life. While at the university, she meets a professor and discovers herself on a new path, to love.

programme.title: South Park: Buddha Box
programme.desc: Cartman has been diagnosed with anxiety.

programme.title: South Park: Tonsil Trouble
programme.desc: After a routine tonsillectomy goes horribly wrong, Cartman comes face to face with his own mortality.

programme.title: South Park: Smug Alert!

programme.title: South Park: Lice Capades

programme.title: South Park: Canada on Strike

programme.title: South Park: The Return of Chef
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Kenny and Cartman are thrilled to have their old friend back when the town is jolted by Chef's sudden reappearance. The boys soon notice that Chef is acting different and his strange behaviour begins to get him in serious trouble.

programme.title: South Park: ManBearPig
programme.desc: The boys are trapped in a cave and Cartman finds a treasure. Meanwhile, Al Gore shows up in town to warn the citizens about the threat of ManBearPig.

programme.title: South Park: Band in China
programme.desc: Randy sees an opportunity for Tegridy in China.

programme.title: The Comedy Central Roast: Rob Lowe
programme.desc: The Comedy Central Roast of Rob Lowe assembles a dais that includes Peyton Manning, Ralph Macchio, Jeff Ross, Nikki Glaser, Rob Riggle, Jewel, Ann Coulter and Roast Master David Spade, who try and take down the ageless heartthrob.

programme.title: Good Talk with Anthony Jeselnik: Tig Notaro
programme.desc: Tig Notaro reveals what she does when she bombs onstage, does her impression of Joan Rivers and Larry David’s baby, and names her least favorite comedian.

programme.title: South Park: Band in China
programme.desc: Randy sees an opportunity for Tegridy in China.

programme.title: Crank Yankers: Jimmy Kimmel, Kathy Griffin and Jeff Ross
programme.desc: Shasta calls neighborhood watch on a white guy, a vape shop fields a complaint, and Elmer is thrilled with his new adult diapers.

programme.title: South Park: How to Eat With Your Butt
programme.desc: Cartman gets Kenny's school picture on every 'missing child' milk carton in the country. Cartman then sees the funniest thing ever and breaks his funny bone, losing his sense of humour.

programme.title: South Park: Free Hat
programme.desc: When the boys find out that their favourite movies are being enhanced, re-released and ruined in the process, they form a club to 'Save Films from their Directors.'

programme.title: South Park: Christian Rock Hard
programme.desc: When the other boys kick Cartman out of their band, he pulls his own group together to make music for Jesus.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Garrison's Fancy New Vagina
programme.desc: As Mr. Garrison enjoys his new womanly attributes after his sex change, the rest of the town gets in touch with their inner feelings too, living their dreams through surgery.

programme.title: South Park: Pee
programme.desc: The boys' fun-filled day at the water park turn deadly when the pool's pee vs. water ratio reaches catastrophic levels.

programme.title: South Park: I Should Have Never Gone Ziplining
programme.desc: The boys' ziplining adventure becomes a terrifying test of survival.

programme.title: South Park: Insheeption
programme.desc: When Stan is sent to the school counsellor because he's holding on to an obscene number of useless possessions, he realizes that Mr. Mackey has a hoarding disorder too.

programme.title: South Park: Bloody Mary
programme.desc: Stan is embarrassed in front of his friends when his father gets pulled over for driving under the influence of alcohol. Meanwhile, a bleeding statue of Mary is discovered and the faithful are flocking to the site, hoping for miraculous healings.

programme.desc: Parks and Recreation worker Leslie Knope is documented by a camera crew while on the job.

programme.title: The Office: Koi Pond

programme.desc: When Michael learns he is going to be honoured at the Dunder Mifflin shareholder meeting in New York City, he brings Andy, Dwight and Oscar with him. Jim is left in charge of the office, and has a hard time getting Ryan to do any work.

programme.title: Movie: Abducted: The Carlina White Story
programme.desc: A newborn is abducted from a New York hospital and eventually solves her own case and is reunited with her biological parents 23 years later.

programme.title: Movie: Love You to Death
programme.desc: After a woman is found dead, authorities worry her disabled daughter has been kidnapped by the killer. However, when the daughter is later found unharmed, a terrible secret emerges.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A college student vanished without a trace, and dirt on a pair of shoes reveals the extent of one man's deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Van-ished
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When a frantic call from a man claiming his wife fell down the stairs brings investigators to their home, they are concerned by the unusually large number of bloodstains, and how big they are.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: When a young mother and her infant son are found dead in a cornfield, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But some insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue, as does a long, blonde hair found on the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.desc: The police are searching for Anthony 'Tony' Burroughs, who shot a man to death and then escaped to the Philippines. William Jordan escaped from prison after being convicted, along with his friend Ted Anthony Prevatte, for the murder of James Rouse.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Deceived to Death
programme.desc: A man's estranged wife hires a man to beat her husband to death. Then, a serial molester in Oregon abducts two women at knifepoint.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: The Stolen Child
programme.desc: During a custody battle, a father finds a note announcing that his estranged wife has vanished with their son and 20 years of cold-case work resolves the rape and strangling of a young mother in the men's bathroom of the building where she was custodian.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Murder in the Mountains
programme.desc: After leaving her husband Shane Miller, Sandy eventually returns home with their two daughters. Days later, a 911 call brings police to the home where they discover the murdered bodies of Sandy and the kids with Shane nowhere to be found.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: No Way Out
programme.desc: Authorities and the family of a young girl do not believe her when she tells them that she is being raped by her stepfather. A grudge fight escalates until one man shoots the other with three friends as witnesses.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Going for Broke
programme.desc: With winter weather closing in, a gold recovery expert comes to help the rookies. Todd discovers a major design flaw in the equipment and is forced to make huge modifications.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Bad Blood
programme.desc: The crew remains in deep financial hole. Veteran miner "Dakota" Fred thinks he can turn things around and he cranks up production faster than ever before. But when things start falling apart, tensions mount and Harness can't keep his frustration in.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Bedrock or Bust
programme.desc: Desperate to get to bedrock and large quantities of gold, Todd and Jack throw caution to the wind and dig deeper than ever before. With the brutal Alaskan winter threatening, they battle floods, cave-ins and equipment breakdowns.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: Never Say Die
programme.desc: With facts and bonus scenes: Todd Hoffman, his father, Jack and their friends head to Alaska in a last-ditch effort to turn their fortunes around. New to gold mining, the rookie crew must overcome incredible challenges if they're going to strike it rich.

programme.title: Gold Rush: No Guts, No Gold
programme.desc: Six men risk everything to strike it rich mining for gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Bombshells and New Claims
programme.desc: The crew arrives in Porcupine Creek hoping to get on the gold in a hurry. The Hoffmans head north to the Klondike to find a new claim after Dakota Fred drops a bombshell on the team and Parker takes over the Big Nugget Mine.

programme.title: Gold Rush: No Guts, No Gold
programme.desc: Six men risk everything to strike it rich mining for gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Big Wins and Bigger Breakdowns
programme.desc: The Hoffmans take on the permafrost hindering their progress at the new claim while the Dakotas run into family troubles setting up their new wash plant. Meanwhile, Parker's season suffers after his winning streak stalls.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Drill or Die
programme.desc: A crew rebellion forces Todd Hoffman to dig test holes on the claim and the tension mounts as they wait to see if they're sitting on a gold-rich pay streak or about to go bust. Fred is forced to abandon mining as floods in North Dakota destroy his home.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Lovestruck
programme.desc: The Hoffmans are finally on the gold, but a new love threatens to derail mechanic James Harness right when the crew needs him most.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Gold at Last
programme.desc: The Hoffman crew discovers their wash plant is blowing gold down the creek, so they tear it apart and rebuild it and eventually find their first gold of the season; Parker Schnabel turns lumberjack to get to the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: On the Gold
programme.desc: The Hoffman crew can finally do their first clean-out of the season now that the wash plant has been prepped. Parker is forced to run his grandfather's safety dirt.

programme.title: Major League Fishing's Pro Bass Tour: Bass Pro Tour: 2019 Stage One Kissimmee
programme.desc: The Championship Round of Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour, stage one, Kissimmee.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mysteries of Jesus
programme.desc: Josh journeys to the Holy Land to investigate a mystery of biblical proportions: where Jesus Christ was born. The investigation leads to potentially explosive revelations that may change our understanding of Jesus' origin story.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mysteries of the Dead Sea Scrolls
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels to the Holy Land to dig in with an archaeologist who has recently discovered new Dead Sea Scrolls. Josh also sees cutting-edge technology restore scroll fragments in a way that could change how we read the Bible.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Treasure of the Copper Scroll
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates a unique Dead Sea Scroll etched with riddles that could lead to an ancient treasure. Following new leads, Josh treks into the punishing Jordanian desert in search of the potential fortune.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Columbus Unearthed
programme.desc: Josh searches the Caribbean and Spain for the missing bones of Columbus.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: America's Lost WWII Hero
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores the case of lost World War II hero Gertrude 'Tommy' Tompkins of the Women Air Force Service Pilots, who went missing when her P-51 Mustang crashed. Josh joins search teams using cutting-edge technology to bring the lost hero home.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cracking the Secret
programme.desc: Josh Gates is on a nation-wide treasure hunt to solve a mystery no one has cracked for forty years: The Secret. Josh travels coast-to-coast and back in time using cutting edge augmented reality and tapping into a network of obsessed Secret detectives.

programme.title: Barrett-Jackson: Live 2019 Las Vegas: Episode 7
programme.desc: Barrett-Jackson: Day 3 coverage from the World's Greatest Collector Car Auction from Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas, NV.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Empire State of Bride

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Don't Show the Goodies
programme.desc: Stephanie has a big budget and wants a show-stopper dress for her second marriage. Courtney Burson is back and she may have finally made up her mind about a dress.

programme.desc: Fashion maven Carson Kressley gets a reading with Theresa. Theresa also channels a woman who died in a brutal murder, and does her first 'automatic writing' in a decade. Nerves are frayed when Theresa's routine mammogram gives rise to some concern.

programme.desc: Jamie goes off-road with his Python wrecker to rescue a propane truck. Al Quiring helps with a semi versus a snowplow. Two big rigs collide, and Mission Towing's Dylan Greenwood has to solve a puzzle of twisted metal.

programme.desc: Jamie and Colin need to recover a buried semi after a massive mudslide cuts off the Trans Canada Highway.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Deadly Cold
programme.desc: Rulon Gardner won the Greco-Roman wrestling gold medal in the 2000 Olympics. Two years later, he got soaked when his snowmobile was stuck in a river. With temperatures plunging to 25 below zero, he faced his toughest opponent: death.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Trapped in a Blizzard
programme.desc: The Kim family take a wrong turn and find themselves stuck in snow on a logging road. With no knowledge about how survive the cold and mountains the Kim's get desperate. After 3 days they run out of food, gas and hopes of another car coming to save them.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Desert Heat
programme.desc: Celebrating their anniversary Rick and Cathy hiked a trail in the Texas desert. They lost track of their location and became dehydrated quickly. Cathy becomes unable to move and Rick becomes their only hope to survive.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Crash Landing
programme.desc: After thousands of hours of painstaking preparation and dangerous flying, a terrible accident devastates the waterbomber crew in Turkey, and everyone at Buffalo. Wilf's first run as flight attendant raises eyebrows among the staff.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Cold Start
programme.desc: A landing gear collapse right on the runway sends everyone scrambling. Everything goes wrong trying to get a frozen DC4 airborne.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Shootout
programme.desc: Rookie co-pilot David faces a remote Arctic airstrip with sketchy landing gear. Mikey drafts a Buffalo hockey team to face off against an NHL squad in a charity shootout. Chuck gets a chance to shine on the ice.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Gear Lock
programme.desc: Devan runs into gear problems when he ferries a mothballed DC3 across the country and a cold snap triggers problems at Buffalo.

programme.desc: A flash flood at an Arkansas campsite flood leaves 20 dead, including 7 children.

programme.title: Flipping Vegas: Frat House
programme.desc: Scott partners with a competitor to flip a former frat house that has a retaining wall nightmare, cracked plaster in the pool and Amie's expensive designs, leaving Scott to believe his profit party is over.

programme.title: Flipping Vegas: Old Folks Home
programme.desc: Scott buys a house that is deteriorating as much as the people that were once living in it.

programme.title: Flipping Vegas: Home Made Presents: Spider House
programme.desc: Scott buys an allegedly vacant house and soon discovers that not all its creepy crawling occupants had left the building.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: The Smell of Money
programme.desc: Team takes on house that has plumbing issues, design disputes, and construction hurdles. Their biggest obstacle is the terrible odour wafting from inside the house, challenging to locate.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: Monster Remodel
programme.desc: This latest zombie house is 3200-square feet and is in fairly good shape, or so it seems. The roof is badly damaged, walls rotting and there is an alligator in the swimming pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Taunted House
programme.desc: The guys get extra cheesy at a pizza parlor, and then head to Wall Street where they ask strangers to help translate bizarre text messages in Spanish. Then, trapped in a haunted house, a nightmare comes to life for tonight's big loser.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Good, the Bad, and the Punished
programme.desc: One Joker committed a misdemeanor while posing as a crabby cabbie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Whose Phone Is Ringing?
programme.desc: Crazy concoctions from the minds of the guys that were too hot for TV.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hellcopter
programme.desc: The joker that required medical attention during the fat foot race punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dark Side of the Moon
programme.desc: The guys make passes at supermarket shoppers, then pose as reporters. Then, with a painfully invasive punishment, tonight's loser is the butt of the joke.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: You're Cut Off
programme.desc: The guys pose as employees at a copy centre, conduct bizarre exit interviews for moviegoers and then lead some very peculiar protests. Later, it's unhappy hour for tonight's big loser, as he cuts off paying customers at a party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Brother of the Sisterhood
programme.desc: The guys play helpless oddballs in a waiting room, then ask grocery shoppers for cash. Then, tonight's loser becomes the number one enemy of women everywhere.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Karen Peralta
programme.desc: On his birthday, Jake brings Amy to meet his mother, but a surprise appearance by his dad throws a wrench in his special day. Meanwhile, Rosa and Charles struggle with a new mandate regarding body cams.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The 9-8
programme.desc: The Nine-Nine host the detectives from the Nine-Eight, their neighbouring precinct, reuniting Jake with his old partner. Charles is immediately jealous and tries to reclaim his best friend status with Jake.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: House Mouses
programme.desc: When Jake insults Hitchcock and Scully's work ethic in the precinct, they force their way into one of his cases in attempt to prove themselves. Meanwhile, Amy and Gina help Rosa conquer one of her biggest fears, and Holt and Boyle work a celebrity case.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Adrian Pimento
programme.desc: When an unstable detective returns to the Nine-Nine after years undercover, Jake doesn't know what to make of him. Meanwhile, Charles' rebellious behavior pits him against the precinct's custodian.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Fameless: Holiday Special
programme.desc: A wannabe game show host and his contestant have an unfortunate run in with Santa Claus. A helpful elf tries to find out if a hospital should be on the naughty or nice list. An aspiring host crashes a holiday event.

programme.title: Fameless: Flash of Brilliance
programme.desc: A wannabe dance discovers that stardom can be gone in a flash, a cooking show contestant accidentally uses a stomach-turning secret ingredient, and a small-time medium gets an extra-large surprise that no psychic could have predicted.

programme.title: Fameless: The Joy of Hex
programme.desc: An aspiring game show host discovers his new show is not the smash hit he thought it would be, and a dog groomer has a ruff first day trying to fix a faux-paw.

programme.title: Fameless: I Robot?/ One Bad Egg
programme.desc: An aspiring traffic cop discovers that his job involves more labor than expected. A diva host gets a reality check, and one trickster's robotic prank short-circuits. A wannabe nature expert gets egged on by his partner and more.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 5
programme.desc: A party entertainer's entire act is squeezing into tiny shirts, a news reporter wanders into a hip-deep puddle in the middle of a story, and a motivational speaker keeps trying - and failing - to break a board over his head.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 6
programme.desc: A wedding DJ plays the bongos on his young assistant's breasts, teenage boys post a video on the web showcasing their furniture humping ability, and a synchronized dance competition is marred by a wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 7
programme.desc: Dancers doing damage to each other, a dentally-challenged Russian boy band, a comedian spicing up his act with pepper spray and a muscle man who bulges in all the wrong places.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Thrillseekers 2
programme.desc: Stars offer hilarious commentaries while viewing footage of the world's dumbest people.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Art
programme.desc: Adam poses the question of what makes great art and shows why pieces visible to the masses are revered, regardless of artistic merit. He exposes the masters as copycats, and reveals that today's art market is a moneymaking scheme.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Suburbs
programme.desc: Adam explains that your lawn is an unnatural monstrosity, suburban design is killing you, and the racist past of suburbs led to segregation in schools.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Conspiracy Theories
programme.desc: Adam debunks the fake moon landing theory, discusses the Satanic Panic of the 1980s and reveals how to spot a false theory.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to Back in Time
programme.desc: Michael jumps back in time and unleashes unseen content for a fresh spin on classic Carbonaro bits. Michael revisits a spirits-drinking spirit, a living fossil, rewrites history again and more with brand-new reactions.
