programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Coast to Coast Classics
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's driving the Camaro all over the nation for some real deal eats.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Eats
programme.desc: Guy's got his sights set on food with international influence. In Richardson, Texas, a Lebanese joint stacks a tall shawarma, while in Vegas, a burger spot adds an Asian twist. And in New York, a pita is done the Druze way.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Land to Sea
programme.desc: Guy samples from the land and the sea, including stops in Syracuse and Kitty Hawk.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Neighborhood Knockouts
programme.desc: Guy's traveling up and down the west coast in search of funky neighbourhood joints.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Family Style
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy is taking a seat at some family restaurants. He stops at a sibling-run Vietnamese place in Utah serving authentic dishes using family recipes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: California Cruisin'
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is on the west coast for a taste of California. In Culver City, Gene Simmons makes a surprise appearance to the neighborhood hangout serving up Hawaiian dishes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mega Meat And Sweet Treats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri dives into mega meat and a little bit of sweet. In Atlanta, a Korean-taqueria mashing up unique flavors in their chicken tacos and bulgogi fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Smoke And Seafood
programme.desc: Guys visits a Baltimore barbecue food truck for pulled pork and ribs, and a shrimp shack in Islamorada.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza Plus
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is divin' into the pie and other major mouthfuls. In Boston, a joint putting beer into their crust and then topping it with taco fixins and a steak-and-cola combo.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Between The Bread
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's always down for a good sandwich, so he's stopping in to check out some of the Triple D Nation's latest creations. A food truck in Nashville put down roots and started churning out cheesy concoctions.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Bacon And Bbq
programme.desc: In Little Rock, Ark., a funky farm-to-table spot piles up a pimento cheeseburger and homemade brats. In Napa, Calif., an amazing Asian joint cooks up kimchi fried rice and pork ramen. In San Antonio, Texas, Guy stops for some bomb barbecue.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Carnivore Creations
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's getting right to the meat of the matter with some carnivore creations. In Portland, Ore., a bomb butchery puttin' out porchetta and a unique style of prosciutto.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burger and Breakfast
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's going from breakfast to burgers. In Vancouver, British Columbia, a pie shop bakin' up both sweet and savory sensations. In Chico, California, a morning hot spot pumping up French toast and spicing up potatoes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chew and Brew
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbin' some grub cooked up at pubs! In Minneapolis, a big-time brewery cooking up dishes like righteous pulled pork and a killer brisket sandwich.

programme.desc: Fred's unhappy that DJ's spending all his spare time at Jackie's house. Becky and Darlene find common ground.

programme.title: Roseanne: Lost Youth
programme.desc: Jackie finds her love life with Fred to be predictable. Mark is jealous of David's academic success and takes it out on his new relationship.

programme.title: Roseanne: Single Married Female

programme.title: Roseanne: Husbands and Wives
programme.desc: Roseanne is up to her usual schemes. First, she cons Darlene out of a portion of her monthly allowance. Then, she plots to reunite Fred and Jackie. There's one glitch - Jackie's not sure she wants Fred back!

programme.title: Roseanne: Happy Trailers
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan secretly attempt to help Becky and Mark with money after they move into a shabby trailer. A further case for concern is the couple's boozy trailer-park neighbor, Sharon.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Blaming of the Shrew

programme.title: Roseanne: The Birds and the Frozen Bees

programme.desc: Safari Park keepers say goodbye to two elephant brothers. We find out if the San Diego Zoo vets can design a custom shoe for Felix, an excitable three-toed baird's tapir. Then, two African Penguin chicks grow up and get ready to join the colony.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mkhaya Discovers Her Trunk
programme.desc: Mkhaya, the youngest baby elephant in the Safari Park herd, learns to use her trunk. Will Alba the Andean bear become a first-time mom? Zoo vets examine Mandazzi the gorilla, and Jeff the snake chaser looks for he elusive costal patch nose snake.

programme.desc: Southern white rhino Victoria is pregnant with a calf that could be a key in saving a species from extinction. Connor the Malayan tiger has tooth trouble. A new bird keeper learns to feed the shoebill. Polar bears use their hunting skills on live prey.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Cheetah Brothers
programme.desc: Matrah the cheetah is shunned by his two brothers after starting to show signs of injury. He is taken to the vet to figure out what's wrong, but the brotherly reunion doesn't go as planned, so keepers fear they may have to separate them.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Heating Up a Sun Bear Romance
programme.desc: Sun bears Toni and Milli are having relationship issues, with Toni being given the cold shoulder. Keepers hope that romance may once again flourish in a brand-new enclosure.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Tiger Eyes
programme.desc: It's a big day for Hunter the Sumatran Tiger. He is blind and must be sedated for his annual eye check, allowing Terri to get closer than usual. The keepers prepare the young giraffe Scarlett for a road trip to South Australia, reuniting her with family.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Giraffe Road Trip
programme.desc: The family prepares Croc One, Steve Irwin's research ship, for a mission to release an endangered sea turtle back to the wild. Scarlett the Giraffe is reunited with her grandmother, and Grub the wild Echidna is released from the Zoo's Wildlife Hospital.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert, King of Cobras
programme.desc: Robert follows in Steve's steps wrangling Utah, a highly venomous 12-foot King Cobra. Dr. Amber visits Tandora to care for wild Koalas. Back at the Zoo, an old injury flares up for Bruce the Brolga, a bird who's been in the Irwin's care for 26 years.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bindi's Lemur Island
programme.desc: The Australia Zoo's Alligator Snapping Turtles need a health check, and it's Robert's job to protect from their fierce bites. Terri and Bindi welcome seven new Lemurs from the US. The Zoo's Rescue Unit is called to save possums caught in a chimney.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Irwin African Adventure
programme.desc: Following Steve's dream of global conservation, the Irwins travel to South Africa. Terri helps release a wild leopard, Bindi learns from the all-female anti-poaching squad The Black Mambas, and Robert attempts to photograph Africa's 'Big Five.'

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: It's a Baby Giraffe!
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck in the Australia Zoo's Mammal Department as Rosie the Giraffe is ready to give birth. Robert has a bloody encounter with a wild python that's entered an enclosure, and Terri helps the keepers wrangle Chief the Tasmanian Devil.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert's Baby Kangaroo
programme.desc: While Bindi and the keepers ready Sophie the baby giraffe for her first steps into her enclosure, Robert helps to hand-raise another baby: Melman the kangaroo. Terri oversees a health check for one of the zoo's favourite characters, Ravi the red panda.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Race to Save the Platypus
programme.desc: Terri welcomes Mballa, a new cheetah cub from South Africa, to the Australia zoo family. Meanwhile, Robert sets out to save a stranded platypus and Bindi prepares to meet Bert the koala Joey as he emerges from his mother's pouch for the first time.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bindi and the Otters
programme.desc: Wes and Robert remove eggs from the nest of saltwater crocs Terra and Bosco, in a nerve-wracking but necessary venture. Bindi tends to the training of otters Percival and Daisy, and Terri makes a Zoo Volunteer's dream come true.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Swimming With Manta Rays
programme.desc: Robert travels to Australia's Great Barrier Reef to help conduct research on manta rays. The Zoo's Rescue Unit, Wildlife Hospital and Volunteers team up to save a baby wallaby struggling to survive. Bindi gets up close and personal with Archie the Dingo.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Pawning Terri's Heart
programme.desc: Terri attends the exam of Charlie the Tiger to determine if his tumors were successfully treated. Bindi and the Small Mammal Team help develop a vaccine for Eden the Tasmanian Devil. Robert discovers the true genders of the Zoo's shingleback lizards.

programme.desc: Family tragedies send a couple's dream of a perfect life up in flames.

programme.desc: Cecil and Larlane Brown have been together for years. But their secrets and lies, ignored and neglected for decades, threaten to turn their 50-year relationship into a bloody battleground.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: A Darker Shade of Blue

programme.desc: For the final battle, two teams made up of an expert pumpkin carver, cake decorator, and sugar artist go head-to-head to create terrifying and scream-worthy displays of an undead dinner party.

programme.title: Freakshow Cakes: Creepy Clowns
programme.desc: They're meant to be the most fun-loving entertainment at the big top, but three teams of bakers create clown cakes that will haunt the dreams of kids and adults alike.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Cities, Skates and Jellyfish Cakes
programme.desc: A birthday girl is thrilled with an underwater creature cake that's taller than her, and a wedding cake combines two cities into one epic display. Then a baking team rolls out a sculpted bust that's ready for the rink.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Movie Munchies
programme.desc: It's movie munchies madness as host Alfonso Ribeiro goes behind the scenes of blockbuster sweets like Dots and Cookie Dough Bites.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Pop Stars
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores some treats with serious pop. He'll pop the top of a Snapple Kiwi Strawberry beverage, pop a bubble with the classic Big League Chew shredded bubblegum, and get the inside scoop at Pez.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Secret Center
programme.desc: Join host Alfonso Ribeiro as he explores foods with secret centers. From the gooey middle of the Mallo Cup to the creamy goodness of a peppermint cream or the surprisingly complex filling in a Mini Beef Wellington.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Sweet and Sour
programme.desc: Pucker up and rev up your sweet tooth as host Alfonso Ribeiro explore snacks with the tongue-tingling twist of sweet and sour!

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Nostalgic Eats
programme.desc: Host Alfonso Ribeiro takes your taste buds back in time to see how the classic Necco Wafers are made.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Farm Fresh
programme.desc: Alfonso showcases foods with farm-fresh ingredients. Go hog wild over Benton's Bacon, see the Georgian pecans going into Carolina Foods' Duchess Pecan Pies.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Barbecue
programme.desc: Roger Mooking cannot resist the sweet, succulent smoky goodness of barbecue as he canvasses the country on the lookout for the fifteen best barbecue dishes wherever he can find them.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Saucy
programme.desc: Roger Mooking scours the U.S. to find 15 of the best dishes that are all about the sauce. There's sticky toffee pudding, super spicy wings, a fondue burger, drunken scallops and even chocolate plus barbecue.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Burritos, Kabobs and S'Mores
programme.desc: In St. Louis, Brad Miller visits the Seoul Taco truck, where Chef David Choi is serving up a unique spin on Mexican food by infusing it with the flavours of Korea. Brad samples a gogi bowl and the popular Korean barbecue burrito with kimchi rice.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Barbecue Ribs, Cheese Melts and Cake Balls
programme.desc: Brad Miller travels to Nashville, Tenn., for hickory-smoked baby back ribs with hot, Memphis-style barbecue sauce from the Smoke Et Al food truck and owner Shane Autrey.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: I'm Stuffed
programme.desc: Michael McKean goes on a spectacular journey of some super stuffed foods. Find out if bao are good enough to save our necks, if toasted ravioli are a big stuffed lie and whether knishes could once land you in jail.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Dishes In Disguise
programme.desc: All is not what it seems as Michael McKean reveals the truth behind dishes in disguise. He uncovers what it took to make turducken tick, and how it takes more than magic to get soup inside soup dumplings.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Finger Foods
programme.desc: Put down your fork and get ready to pick up some amazing finger food facts! Michael McKean has things handled, finding out how appetizers found their footing during Prohibition, that a king turned tapas into a tableside treat.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Gadgets And Gizmos
programme.desc: Michael McKean has gadgets and gizmos a'plenty, and he's ready to show them all off! Discover that waffle irons were once incredible artists and the stand mixer almost went overboard, and find out why refrigerators could have been left out in the cold.

programme.title: Good Eats: Chile's Angles
programme.desc: Alton investigates the fruity heat of chillies and that ubiquitous condiment: salsa.

programme.title: Good Eats: Herbal Preservation
programme.desc: Alton shows us how to use and care for fresh herbs.

programme.title: Good Eats: Citizen Cane
programme.desc: Alton Brown explains how easy and delicious sugar recipes can be. Featured recipes: burned peach ice cream and banana splitsville.

programme.title: Good Eats: Kinda Blue (Blueberry)
programme.desc: Alton Brown reveals the secrets to turning the blueberry into a year-round treat.

programme.title: DuckTales: McMystery at McDuck McManor
programme.desc: When Scrooge unexpectedly disappears during his birthday party, Huey, Dewey and Louie find themselves hosting a mystery party where everyone is a suspect.

programme.title: DuckTales: Terror of the Terra-firmians

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Great Eggspectations/ Hotel Pennsylvania

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Summerween

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!

programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: 'The Carrie Nelson Case' - The brutal murder of a State Park employee rattles tourists and fellow employees alike. Murdered for just $2,000, police sift through several hundred leads to find a killer so merciless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Jim Jones: Unholy Massacre
programme.desc: More than 900 Americans died in an isolated jungle in northern Guyana in November 1978. Jim Jones, has gone down in history as a madman who drove his followers to suicide. But the truth is more complicated and more tragic than that.

programme.title: Very Scary People: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Secret
programme.desc: This is the shocking and gruesome mystery of John Wayne Gacy, a popular Chicago businessman and part-time clown who was leading a double life in the 1970s. By day he was a community leader and by night a predator of young men.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Aileen Wuornos: Monster Made
programme.desc: A look at the dealmakers and hangers-on surrounding convicted serial killer Aileen Wuornos known as ''America's first female serial killer.'

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Moving Toward the Future
programme.desc: Atz Sr., Bonnie, Atz Lee and Shane struggle to move a two-ton bridge maintain crucial access to the head of the bay. Otto & Charlotte fight a serious threat to their cattle.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Stranded
programme.desc: Still reeling from the earthquake, the Kilchers rush to make headway on time sensitive projects. Otto, Charlotte, and Eivin travel to rescue a family relic. The first fishing trip of the year leaves Eve and Jane lost at sea.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: The Day the Homestead Caught Fire
programme.desc: Otto is forced to the edge after a chimney fire threatens to destroy his cabin. Eivin and Eve burn up dangerous brush piles, threatening their family. Atz Lee and Jane embark on a dangerous ice fishing mission and end up on thin ice.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier Exposed: Of Grizzlies and Buffalo
programme.desc: Atz Lee and Jane come across a massive grizzly while hunting for black bear. Later, Otto and Jane head to Kodiak Island to rescue a herd of wild buffalo. Back on the homestead, the family takes on a variety of home repairs.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: The Rules of Jane
programme.desc: Jane Kilcher relays her five rules that have helped take her from homestead to greenhorn.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Jewels's Homecoming
programme.desc: Featuring interviews with the Kilchers. Atz Senior's daughter, singer-songwriter, Jewel, and her son, Kase, visit the homestead.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Greener Pastures
programme.desc: The Kilchers race to finish a year's worth of work in just four months. To fill their freezer, Atz Lee and Jane chase the first salmon run of the season, while Otto and Eivin bolster the homestead's defenses to contain their unruly cattle herd.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Frozen Out
programme.desc: The Hoffman crew battles frozen dirt and frozen pipes as they struggle to hit their goal of 100 ounces for the season. Parker Schnabel makes a last ditch effort at Smith Creek Hill and the Dakota Boys' season may be over.

programme.title: Raised Hunting: The Good Stuff
programme.desc: With creative tactics and some of the Raised camera crew, Karin gets David out of his one dimensional archery-only box.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: A car crashes into a computer store. A snowmobile jump comes up short. A motorcycle without a driver and a mad bull take aim at a crowd, and a forest fire is caught on camera.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Judgment Day
programme.desc: Todd's decision to run the dozer on solid ice leaves the crew unable to reach their quota. Big Nugget may face closure.

programme.title: Major League Fishing's Pro Bass Tour: Bass Pro Tour: 2019 Stage One Kissimmee
programme.desc: The Championship Round of Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour, stage one, Kissimmee.

programme.title: Gold Rush: No Guts, No Gold
programme.desc: Six men risk everything to strike it rich mining for gold.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: A Bridge and a Bear
programme.desc: Atz Lee builds a bridge and encounters a predator in the backcountry. Otto's hay season nearly comes to a halt when a broken tractor forces him to get creative. Eivin, Eve and Bonnie journey to Atz Sr's floating homestead to bring him crops.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: To Live or Die on Perl Island
programme.desc: Atz Lee goes to Pear Island to build a homestead for a friend. Conflict arises as Otto, Eivin, and Levi work to move an old workshop cabin to Otto's property. Tela builds a fence for a surprise horse for her kids.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Earning Seven
programme.desc: Jewel Kilcher throws her son a Yuletide celebration. Atz Lee deal with worsening weather to help Grady build a homestead. Otto makes a drawbridge between his cabin and new man cave.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Calling All Kilchers

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Coming of Age
programme.desc: Eivin takes son Findlay on his first ever, coming of age hunt. Atz Lee and Jane venture far out into the wilderness to fish for elusive pike. Atz Sr. upgrades the Yuletide for the impending cold.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Hill Country Hunt
programme.desc: Atz Lee and Atz Sr. take Jane on an epic hunt on horseback in the foothills. Eivin builds a one-of-a-kind motorized cart for Findlay. Otto, Charlotte, and August race to repair a fence breach after their cattle escape.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Wind and a Prayer
programme.desc: Otto and Levi bring wind power to the remote cabin. Atz Les and Jane help homesteader Mike repurpose an old city house. The Kilchers help Tela with her dry spring. August moves back home on his 21st birthday.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Fool's gold

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Showing Off Your Assets
programme.desc: Emily wants to look ultra-sexy on her big day despite her mom's traditional requests. Aja is searching for a dress that shows off her curves, but struggles to impress her opinionated entourage. Courtney hopes her new chest will fill out her dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Family Rules
programme.desc: Tanya brings her outspoken family to help her find a blush-coloured dress. Mary Beth, who has ovarian cancer, is excited to dress shop with three generations of family members. Stella decides to bring only her mother to her first fitting.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Sister Act!
programme.desc: Samantha is a triplet whose opinionated sisters want to make the final dress decision! Sisters Jessica and Kristen shop together to find they have surprisingly similar tastes. Amy opted for a more modest dress, but is having second thoughts.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: It Fits, She Scores!
programme.desc: Kristi is marrying a pro-baseball pitcher and is looking for a glitzy dress to complement her luxurious lifestyle. Sports fan Jenna wants a dress that will knock it out of the park. Jennifer hopes that her boss will help her find the dress of her dreams.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Day of Challenges
programme.desc: Stefania wants a simple, classic gown, but her family has grander ideas. Precious just had weight loss surgery and needs a gown to fit her shrinking frame. Cheryl’s wedding is in 72 days and she needs a dress to fit her thick frame and tall height.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Father of the Bride
programme.desc: Daddy's girl, Katie, comes to the salon hoping to find the perfect mermaid style dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Better Than the First
programme.desc: Mackenzie is on the hunt for a third dress to replace the two she already has. Kelly is looking for a dress that can outdo the one she found, which is over her budget. Rachael is looking to replace a lace mermaid gown she bought and now can't stand.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not What I Was Expecting
programme.desc: Emily, a rock star by night, wants to shake her all-black attire for a traditional gown. Brittany has bright red hair and tattoos and wants to show them off in a sexy lace gown. Lauren is nervous that her friends will think her dress is too unusual.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: You're Making Me Blush
programme.desc: Kara fell in love with a statement red dress at another salon, but her future mother-in-law has more traditional gown ideas. Sheena needs a colourful dress to wear to her Indian wedding reception. Later, Tamara tries on her dress for the first time.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: One of a Kind Dress Requests
programme.desc: Having tried on 100 gowns, Lisa is still looking for her dream dress. Brittany is determined to wear pink on her big day - which is only 3 months away.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: No Room for Compromise
programme.desc: Petite bride Christine is looking for a gown to match her '20s theme-inspired wedding. Stefanny wants a sexy dress to wear on her big day, but her parents have other ideas. Valentina returns for her fitting to add a personal touch to her gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Chart Topping Dress
programme.desc: Country star Whitney Duncan needs a dress that, like her, commands centre stage. Rock girl Chic wants a gown that is hot, sexy and beautiful. Songwriter Kiirsten is nervous for her fitting, but should be more worried about her veil.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: If You've Got it, Flaunt It
programme.desc: Kia is a pro-basketball player embracing her height, as she looks for the perfect long dress for her six-inch heels. Comedian Christie looks for a dress to show off what her mama gave her. Queen Precious has lost 100 pounds and hopes her dress still fits.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Thorn in the Bride's Side

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Like Mother, Unlike Daughter

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Francesca returns for a second visit, but her picky entourage may not let her choose the dress she loves. Brittany wants a non-traditional gown, but her mom is not on board. Samantha gets fitted for her reception dress, but the top is completely sheer.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Sexy Sells
programme.desc: Nik Wallenda pushes for his wife Erendira to choose a sexy gown – within limits! Amy returns for a dress that's even racier than her last one, but her twin still begs her to cover up. Jaya is hesitant to adhere to her fiancé's form fitting preference.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Case of Dress Distress
programme.desc: Jamie is devastated when she falls in love with an over-budget gown her bossy bridesmaid picks out. Natalie has trouble committing to a dress in the absence of her ill mother. Fitting bride Nadia is nervous her reception gown will be the wrong colour.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Drama, Drama, Drama!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Vision Confusion
programme.desc: Lauren wants to look like a 'classy porn star' at her wedding, but she's in for a surprise. Bride Cheryl only knows what she does not want her wedding dress to look like. Bride Amanda hopes her custom gown lives up to the vision in her mind.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: 'Please Love My Dress'
programme.desc: Eccentric Marlene wants a feathered or black ball gown, but her parents prefer something traditional. Jessica loves every dress she tries on, but her family likes none. Angelina is head-over-heels for a bohemian gown, but no one in her group is on board.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: V.I.Pnina

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Stacking the Deck

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Break Free
programme.desc: Kim devotes her time and energy to helping free Alice Johnson from prison. Khloé stresses about spending her first night away from baby True, and Kanye finds himself in hot water over some controversial comments.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Chicago Loyalty

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kourtney's Choice

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Eat Pray Fight
programme.desc: The family heads to Bali for a relaxing vacation, but tensions flare when Kourtney accuses Khloe of complaining too much. Scott tries to find buried treasure and enlists the help of his kids. In LA, Kendall and Kylie help their mom care for MJ.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Soul(mate) Searching

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Legally Brunette

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fire Escape

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Pet Peeve

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Unhappy Camper

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Christmas Chaos

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Heavy Meddle

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: The 22-Year Itch

programme.desc: When a man with no enemies and few friends is viciously murdered in a quiet neighborhood of Calgary, Detective Peter Bakers struggles to determine who could have done it.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Not in My Yard
programme.desc: A rash of break-ins shatters the peace in a tight community, and when residents take sides along the fault lines; good friends turn into deadly enemies.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Last One to See Them
programme.desc: An investigation of Felix Vail, the man accused of murdering his first wife, Mary Vail, in 1962; and the other women in his life, Sharon Hensely and Annette Craver, are gone without a trace. Next month, after 50 years, Felix will stand trial for murder.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: White Hot Rage
programme.desc: When a man with no enemies and few friends is viciously murdered in a quiet neighborhood of Calgary, Detective Peter Bakers struggles to determine who could have done it.

programme.title: Deadly Affairs: To Catch a Cheat
programme.desc: Sexy Russian co-ed, Irina Zadornov falls for an aspiring lawyer, but she doesn't know he's still hot for an old flame. And later, when a Texas heartthrob, with a rotating slate of lovers, goes missing, investigators are left with no shortage of questions.

programme.title: Deadly Affairs: Playing With Hearts
programme.desc: In Sioux Falls' deaf community, Darlene Vander Giesen finds the perfect romance until a jealous friend severs the bond. Later, pilot Lance Anderson makes flight attendant, Kathi, his wife. When she meets Capt. Gerald Russell, heavy turbulence ensues.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Young Mom Missing
programme.desc: A young mother from Austin, Texas suddenly drops out of contact. Police believe she may be taking a break somewhere, possibly with a new man. But Julie's family fears the worst.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: We've Got Your Daughter
programme.desc: When Jamey Walker is kidnapped and murdered, her mother dedicates the rest of her life to finding her killer.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Gulf Coast Vanishings
programme.desc: In Southwest Florida, Terrance Williams, a young father, disappears. As his mother retraces his steps she uncovers something ominous: the last known person to see Terrance alive has a strange and disturbing connection to another missing man.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: A Place She'd Call Home
programme.desc: Police are baffled when Melissa White is found murdered in the backyard of her Viola, Illinois home. But when investigators take a closer look at Melissa's neighbors, they unearth a secret. Could this be the key to apprehending Melissa's murderer?

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Dangers of Success
programme.desc: As a prominent family awakens to noises in the night, their worst nightmare ensues when their beloved daughter Terri Ann McCoy is fatally shot. Investigators work through leads and lies to discover the perpetrators were closer than they realized.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Sinner and The Saint
programme.desc: When the sleepy town of Mooresburg, TN receives news that beloved teacher Margaret Jack Sliger is murdered on her farm, Hawkins County detectives are charged with finding the sinister perpetrator to bring their community justice.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: This Just In
programme.desc: After college co-ed Jessica O'Grady vanishes late one night after leaving to see her boyfriend, locals are left to wonder if she was kidnapped.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: All News Is Local
programme.desc: In August 2000, 19-year-old Jessica Carpenter was found dead in her Aiken, SC home by her own mother. Local reporters and family members tell the story of a town frozen in terror as police search for a possible serial killer on the loose.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: We're Watching You
programme.desc: 40 year-old Rachael Anderson, mother of four, calls an old friend one Friday evening in April 2010 about a home improvement project she'd never complete. Eight years later, she's still missing, and two men are behind bars.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Local Girl Gone
programme.desc: A high school freshman disappears. As hours turn to days, her family and town residents wonder if a killer is in the midst.

programme.title: American Monster: Live by the Sword
programme.desc: Outside Los Angeles, sword collector Neal Williams is the house-husband while his wife Manling keeps the family afloat. It's a tough but happy life, as their home videos attest. Until Manling returns home to find her family slaughtered - at sword point.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: Weaponology: Tanks
programme.desc: Uncover the killer genes in the tank's family tree.

programme.title: Al Capone: Public Enemy #1
programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by US government Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: Bugsy Siegel: Godfather of Vegas
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: Jonestown Massacre: As We Watched
programme.desc: This hour goes inside the People's Temple to see how Jim Jones lured 1000 Americans to Guyana and forced them to die in the largest mass murder-suicide in U.S. history prior to 9/11.

programme.title: Mafia's Killing Machine: The DeMeo Crew
programme.desc: The story of Roy DeMeo, a member of the infamous Gambino family who was suspected of heading a crew that killed and dismembered dozens of people.

programme.title: Whitey Bulger: Final Takedown
programme.desc: In 1995 ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Jonestown Massacre: As We Watched
programme.desc: This hour goes inside the People's Temple to see how Jim Jones lured 1000 Americans to Guyana and forced them to die in the largest mass murder-suicide in U.S. history prior to 9/11.

programme.title: Mafia's Killing Machine: The DeMeo Crew
programme.desc: The story of Roy DeMeo, a member of the infamous Gambino family who was suspected of heading a crew that killed and dismembered dozens of people.

programme.title: Whitey Bulger: Final Takedown
programme.desc: In 1995 ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Bugsy Siegel: Godfather of Vegas
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: The Mafia Kingpin
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and the the model for running crime business.

programme.title: Mafia vs. JFK
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroys his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.desc: The crew work to save an old cabin in Oakland, Maine, that Eric purchased from his father. He hopes the renovation will give the cabin many more years of life so he can shire his childhood memories there with his own children.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Pilsbury Family Rafting Cabin
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned Maine cabins. They give these forlorn properties the facelift they've needed for decades. You never know what you might find when you go for a walk.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Crashing Down in Connecticut
programme.desc: A Connecticut couple's first flip spirals out of control as they go further over budget with every project they tackle. While she struggles to get things back on track, his love of new tools and expensive fixtures constantly interferes.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Unscrewed Flip
programme.desc: A real estate agent takes on a flip with her mom in Bossier City, Louisiana. These novices are in over their heads from the start as basic tools cause a struggle and attempted projects go awry.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: A Day Late and a Nickel Short
programme.desc: A married couple flip a home in Oklahoma City. As they encounter an unexpected and costly delay, concerns grow about the cost of extending their renovation.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Batter Up!
programme.desc: A SWAT expert breaks out the force's battering ram for his and his girlfriend's first flip. They're off to a great start with the big guns, but it's the small tools that give them the most trouble during their West Palm Beach, Florida flip.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Flipping Over Cabinets
programme.desc: A daughter enlists her mom as her partner for a flip in East Tennessee. They have big hopes for the renovation but their methods clash when the daughter wants to move through projects quickly instead of following her mother's tested methods.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Praying for An Easy Flip
programme.desc: Two pastors at the same church flip a house in Muskegon, MI. One has prior renovation experience and is confident he can lead the charge while the other is hoping to learn new skills along the way.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Crashing Down in Connecticut
programme.desc: A Connecticut couple's first flip spirals out of control as they go further over budget with every project they tackle. While she struggles to get things back on track, his love of new tools and expensive fixtures constantly interferes.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Pilsbury Family Rafting Cabin
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned Maine cabins. They give these forlorn properties the facelift they've needed for decades. You never know what you might find when you go for a walk.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Boomtown Builder: 1915 Smelter House
programme.desc: Tim McClellan lends his talents to two amazing spaces that need reimagining in Clemenceau, Arizona. He creates wildly unique builds while unearthing the mysterious history of an adobe outbuilding.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: The Container Collaboration
programme.desc: Casey and Catrina combine two shipping containers to create a one bedroom house with an outdoor courtyard area. During the build, Gary's Girls approach Casey with an offer to sell him their container house after their previous sale fell through.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: The Snow Sisters' Roach-Infested Home vs. Randy's Cabin In The Woods
programme.desc: Donna and Toni win a red and green 'Christmas Tree' house, but the presents inside aren't what they wanted. Randy scores a cabin in the woods with tons of character, but it's surrounded by trees.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Gary's Girls' Elevator Barn Build
programme.desc: Gary's Girls turn a bare-bones barn into a two-story house with special installation requests from the buyer including a unique elevator.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Randy's Big Bed and Breakfast
programme.desc: Randy wins a huge house at auction and brings Casey in to help turn it into a bed and breakfast-style home at the request of a potential buyer. To make it unique for each guest, Randy plans different features and designs for each room.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Gary's Girls' Airplane Overhaul
programme.desc: Gary's Girls visit an airplane junkyard and end up buying two old passenger jets. Positioning the plane bodies’ side-by-side, they use the space inside and also between the two fuselages to create a one-of-a-kind, high-flying home.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Snow Sisters' American Gothic Allure
programme.desc: The sisters have their work cut out for them after losing a major portion of their house during the move. Once they get started, they step outside the box and give their home a gothic theme with beautiful windows and woodwork.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Tale of Two Houses
programme.desc: Nicole is back in action and juggling two Detroit houses at the same time. While the Ferndale house is in great shape, the 14 Mile property is gutted of its original fixtures and charm. Ferndale serves as the inspiration for renovations at 14 Mile.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Close Quarters
programme.desc: Nicole tackles a 1920s house that used to be a rental and has incredibly small upstairs bedrooms. She plans to change the layout and add character, including removing a wall to make room for a new hallway and custom linen closet.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Master Bath Miracle
programme.desc: Nicole finds that turning a tiny, dated bathroom into an en suite master bath isn't easy as she struggles to fit a soaking tub, shower and custom vanity in the space to give it stately, historic appeal.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Maximizing the Master Suite
programme.desc: Nicole has almost completed the upstairs in her 14-Mile house. Now it's to time to unveil a bigger and brighter master bedroom. To get the look she wants, she has to knock down some walls, open up the ceiling and bring in a very special feature.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Matching Game
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis continues work on the den and powder room of her 1920s 14-Mile house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Basement Blues
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis ventures down into the creepy basement of her 14-Mile project. She's then faced with a dilemma when an unforeseen turn of events threatens the entire project.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Cooking Up the Kitchen
programme.desc: Nicole begins construction in the kitchen of the 14 Mile house. Working with a limited space and no original details, she is forced to attempt something she has never done before: an open kitchen.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Adding Style to 14 Mile
programme.desc: As the renovation of the 14 Mile house winds down, there's one more thing that needs to be done: finish the exterior. After repairing damage from a car accident, Nicole has a chance to bring back original details the house lost decades ago.

programme.title: Good Eats: Ham I Am
programme.desc: Cured, smoked, raw, brined or fresh, Alton Brown gets the juices going for some good old American ham. With recipes for Country Ham and City Ham.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Mash-Ups

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mumbai
programme.desc: Andrew unveils Mumbai's multicultural flavors and addictive ingredients. A city built on chaos and hard work, Mumbai showcases its history through its delicious eateries. The city's edible icons include deep-fried fish and prawns and saucy goat.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chengdu
programme.desc: From the blistering 'Hot Pot' and fiery Mapo Tofu to spicy Kung Pao Chicken, Andrew Zimmern explores the famous scorching dishes that make Chengdu, China, a delicious destination.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Savannah
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the flavour-packed favourites of Savannah, Georgia, like creamy shrimp and grits, briny oysters in a half shell, upscale crab bisque and down-home barbecue stew so thick it'll make your spoon stand up.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Albuquerque

programme.desc: The turtles are back and this time they've got awesome powers.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Curiosity/ House Pest
programme.desc: Alvin gets a taste of his own medicine when he pulls one too many practical jokes on Simon.When Miss Croner finds termites have infested her home, she moves in with the chipmunks and drives everyone crazy.

programme.title: RBUK: The Boaracle/ Out of the Box
programme.desc: The Boaracle, a boar who claims to predict the future, makes a series of predictions about Miguel that all come true. When Felicity goes viral doing fun unboxing videos, a jealous Rudy slips Pandora's Box into her scratching post house.

programme.title: Lucky
programme.desc: Unlucky leprechaun, Happy McSweeney, is in for the adventure of a lifetime when he and his friends set out on a daring mission to retrieve the pot of gold that was stolen by the evil Houlihan from the McSweeney family years ago.

programme.title: Movie: Escape From Mr. Lemoncello's Library
programme.desc: Twelve children set out on a scavenger hunt in a high-tech library to see who can get out first.

programme.title: Movie: Jinxed
programme.desc: A teenager sets out to break the curse that has jinxed her family with bad luck for 100 years.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Whittle Me This/ Mayor May Not
programme.desc: Catman thinks Timmy has been kidnapped. He mistakes Chloe for Catgirl and enlists her help to save Timmy.Timmy wishes Dad was Mayor, but Timmy gets tortured by the paparazzi and risks having his fairies discovered.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Who's Your Daddy/ Homewrecker
programme.desc: Dad can't attend a Squirrelly Scout Festival; Vicky frames Timmy for destroying his house.

programme.title: Movie: Meet the Robinsons
programme.desc: An orphan who dreams of a family of his own is whisked into the future by a mysterious stranger.

programme.title: Movie: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: Charlie Bucket lives in a tiny house with his parents and grandparents, and would like nothing more than to win a tour of Willy Wonka's chocolate factory. The adventure begins when he miraculously finds the last golden ticket in a chocolate bar.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Terrifying Tri-State Trilogy of Terror
programme.desc: In the first tale, Buford breaks a rule that turns Perry into an evil facsimile. Tale two tells of Doofenshmirtz’s encounter with a floating baby head that grants cursed wishes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Night of the Living Pharmacists
programme.desc: Doofenshmirtz's latest '-inator' accidentally turns the citizens of Danville into contagious Doof-zombies who run rampant all over town. Agent P and the kids must work together to save Danville and avoid becoming Doof-zombies themselves.

programme.title: Movie: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: Charlie Bucket lives in a tiny house with his parents and grandparents, and would like nothing more than to win a tour of Willy Wonka's chocolate factory. The adventure begins when he miraculously finds the last golden ticket in a chocolate bar.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Ultimate Spider-Man
programme.desc: Miles Morales is bitten by an experimental spider and becomes Kid Arachnid. Spidey teaches Miles the responsibilities of being a superhero before he puts himself in danger.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Failure Mode
programme.desc: Hiro becomes demoralized when his latest school project fails spectacularly.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Monster From Id/ Gi-Ants
programme.desc: After losing a gift that Jeremy made for her, Candace is determined to recreate it before he realizes it's missing. Candace can't remember what it looks like, and has Phineas and Ferb use their mind machine to recapture her memory of it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Agent Doof/ Phineas and Ferb the Temple of Juatchadoon
programme.desc: The boys go to Central America to help Damsel in Distress, after finding an amulet, but Dr. Doofenshmirtz wants to use their amulet to destroy the world.

programme.title: DuckTales: Day of the Only Child!
programme.desc: Dewey creates a holiday so that triplets can be only children for just one day. Quickly, the brothers learn that they need each other more than they realized.

programme.title: DuckTales: Happy Birthday, Doofus Drake!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Sock Opera
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress a local puppeteer, Mabel decides to put on a huge sock puppet rock opera, but her show goes awry when Dipper’s drive to uncover journal secrets leads to a supernatural disaster.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Summerween
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel are excited to join in on the fun, but when Wendy casually mentions that trick-or-treating is for kids, Dipper's whole outlook on the evening changes. Dipper accidentally insults a monster who makes him fill his candy quota or be eaten.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Aiger's Rematch! Unbreakable Bond!
Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: A Fiery Training Camp Trick!
DuckTales: The Duck Knight Returns!
programme.desc: When Scrooge and Dewey make a gritty Darkwing Duck movie, Launchpad teams up with the original Darkwing to stop it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Gift Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: In three separate mysterious tales, Stan is cursed by a witch, Waddles accidentally eats a bowl of brain-enhancing jelly and builds a machine that allows him to speak for the first time and Mabel faces her fear of Claymotion.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Breakfast at Lydia's/ The Trouble With Wendys
programme.desc: Mavis wins employee of the month and the right to share breakfast with Aunt Lydia. Later, Dr. Gillman saves Wendy's ponytail and now she's indebted to him.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Frankenstunt/ What About Blob
programme.desc: Hank has to pretend to be his dad as he films his new action flick. Mavis and Wendy set up Aunt Lydia and Bob Blob on a date.

programme.title: Movie: Meet the Robinsons
programme.desc: An orphan who dreams of a family of his own is whisked into the future by a mysterious stranger.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Enter the Nosepicker/ Hide and Shriek
programme.desc: Mavis accidentally lures a Nose Picker into the hotel. Later, Mavis finds her childhood toy, Demented Debbie, in the attic.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Bad Friday/ Hoop Screams
programme.desc: The monsters celebrate bad Friday by trying to win the Screamie for the best scare. Mavis gives Hank the gift of basketball.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Buggin' Out/ How Do You Solve a Problem Like Medusa
programme.desc: While doing her chores around the hotel, Mavis mistakes truth bugs for bed bugs. Mavis invites Lydia's high school rival to the hotel.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Adventures in Vampiresitting/ Phlegm Ball
programme.desc: The kids get trapped in a human house. Mavis' cousin shows up and challenges her to a game of phlegm ball.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Wendy Big and Tall/ Doppelfanger
programme.desc: Mavis accidentally turns Wendy into a ginormous, blobby version of her little self. Mavis' teen crush, Jett Black, visits the hotel.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Great Eggspectations/ Hotel Pennsylvania
programme.desc: Mavis tries to prove she can care for a living creature by rescuing a 'bad egg.' The kids try to watch the last episode of their favourite show, Hotel Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Five: 1980-1989
programme.desc: The 1980s begin with Herschel Walker leading Georgia to a national title as a freshman. After Bear Bryant retires in 1982 and passes away four weeks later, control of the SEC is eventually transferred to Pat Dye and Bo Jackson at Auburn.

programme.title: UFC 243
programme.desc: Robert Whittaker takes on Israel Adesanya in mixed martial arts action at Marvel Stadium in Melbourne, Australia. Robert Whittaker vs. Israel Adesanya

programme.title: The Season: Ole Miss Football
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes with linebackers coach Jeff Koonz, cook in the kitchen with Donta Evans and watch fan favorite Senquez Golson get inducted to the Ole Miss M-Club Hall of Fame.

programme.title: E:60: Sammy Sosa
programme.desc: Twenty years after allegations of PED use and other criticisms, Sammy Sosa grants a rare interview and look into his personal life.

programme.title: Movie: I, Robot
programme.desc: In 2035, robots that have been programmed to never hurt humans have become part of the daily lives of people. When the main suspect in the murder of a scientist is a robot, a robot-hating detective begins to wonder if humans are actually safe.

programme.title: Movie: Cold Pursuit

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Welcome Home, Jake
programme.desc: Lyndsey discovers that Alan is sleeping with Larry's sister, Gretchen. Meanwhile, Walden struggles with telling Barry to find his own place.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Mama Drama
programme.desc: Adam's desire to be the lead in the school musical 'Jesus Christ Superstar' goes unfulfilled when he's cast in something other than the leading role. Insistent that her son is a star, Beverly casts Adam in a rival show, but he becomes too self-obsessed.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: You're Not Invited
programme.desc: Adam is very excited for his laser tag birthday party since he plans to invite Dana for the first time. But Barry thinks the theme is childish and agrees to help Adam organize a secret makeout party in the basement.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Pop-Up Sale
programme.desc: When Max's stove breaks, Caroline tries to return some of her expensive rings to Barney's Department Store, but she learns that her surname is no longer an asset in her former home away from home.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: All Star Blues
programme.desc: Jason begins to question his future and starts planning for retirement when he doesn't get selected for the Pro Bowl game. Malik is selected and decides not to take Tasha with him to Hawaii, fearing she will embarrass him by trying to scout new clients.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Sink Hole
programme.desc: When Mike and Boyd narrowly miss a sinkhole on the interstate, Boyd becomes petrified of leaving the house. Matters get more complicated when Mike and Ryan have different opinions on how best to ease Boyd's fears.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Vivica A. Fox, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Jodi Miller, and Billy Gardell.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Rowe vs. Buckner

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Doggonit /No Gear
programme.desc: A dog bite, an eviction, and a withheld security deposit; Man sues over clothes damaged.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Roommate Rumble/ Fly-By-Night Producer
programme.desc: A dispute between former roommates over lost security deposit; a cameraman sues for breach of contract.

programme.title: Right This Minute

programme.desc: A man believes it’s medically impossible for him to have gotten his girlfriend pregnant, but she presents evidence to prove he is her son’s father.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Reunion Rip/ She's My Mom Too
programme.desc: A dispute over a custom dress; siblings argue over the cost of their mother's care.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman is suing her friend for an unpaid bill and lost wages as she claims he caused her to be fired from her job. Her friend is countersuing for the same bill and his lost wages as he claims she caused him to be fired.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Copping Out On A Cousin ; Caught In The Middle.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Stealing from an ex-husband; being stinky; going too wide.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Canine Conception/ Joint Account
programme.desc: Owner sues over dog's unexpected pregnancy; dispute over withdrawals from joint account.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A man is suing his ex-fiancée for the return of the engagement ring; the defendant claims her ex-fiancé is a and she shouldn’t have to return the ring. Then, neighbours dispute a botched car sale where the seller didn't mention the car was repossessed.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did My Own Mother Steal My Money?
programme.desc: Courtney's saved money has gone missing, and she thinks only her mother Kimberly could have stolen it. Meanwhile, Princess believes her neighbor Keith has stolen her phone filled with nude pictures and sex videos.

programme.title: Maury: I Can't Leave Your Husband Alone ... I'll Prove He's My Baby's Father
programme.desc: Jasma is furious at Jermale for denying her daughter. Judy and Scarlet are back to prove to Judy's ex Cody and his wife that Cody's the father of their daughter. Jordan and Kiarra had a fairytale romance, until another guy said he was Kiarra's baby daddy.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Fights
programme.desc: Ashley and her good friend Paige are here because they are tired of 'no-good' women breaking up their happy homes. Ashley pregnant and her boyfriend and father to her unborn child admits to cheating on her with a woman named Summer.

programme.title: Maury
programme.desc: Maury Povich explores compelling issues that impact society as a whole, and digs deep to get to the heart of the matter.

programme.title: Movie: Wild Hogs
programme.desc: A group of middle-aged men try to put their troubles behind them as they set out on a road trip on their Harleys.

programme.title: Movie: The Family Fang
programme.desc: Baxter and Annie's parents are notorious practical jokesters, but when mom and dad suddenly and mysteriously disappear, the siblings must investigate to find out if it's just another ruse or if there's cause for concern.

programme.title: Movie: Justice League

programme.title: Movie: Beerfest

programme.desc: Research shifts to Louisiana, Oswald's home city in the months prior to the murder of John F. Kennedy. A reconstruction of Oswald's timeline in New Orleans reveals a void where no one heard from or saw Oswald.

programme.title: Mom: Three Smiles and An Unpainted Ceiling

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: My Damn Stalker
